tickets.label: aggregate
tickets.title: Realized annualized fee rate deviates from claimed 0.66%
tickets.note: Formula: observed = fees_derived_90d_annualized / lazy_tvl_window_avg_usd, where fees_derived_90d_annualized = fees_derived_90d * (365 / days_in_window). Window: 2025-12-05 to 2026-03-04 (90 fee days, 90 TVL points).
